title: Premium Leather Watch
description: Handcrafted genuine leather watch with stainless steel case and water-resistant design. Perfect for formal and casual occasions.

title: Gaming Laptop Pro
description: High-performance gaming laptop with RTX graphics, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD. Built for professional gamers and creators.

title: Handwoven Silk Shawl
description: Exquisite handwoven silk shawl featuring traditional Pakistani embroidery. A statement piece for any wardrobe.

title: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and crystal-clear audio quality.

title: Mountain Trekking Backpack
description: Durable 45L trekking backpack with waterproof coating, ergonomic straps, and multiple compartments for extended hikes.

title: Vintage Ceramic Tea Set
description: Elegant 6-piece ceramic tea set with hand-painted floral patterns. Includes teapot, cups, and serving tray.

title: Professional DSLR Camera
description: Full-frame DSLR camera with 24.5MP sensor, 4K video recording, and dual card slots. Ideal for professionals.

title: Organic Skincare Bundle
description: Complete organic skincare set with cleanser, toner, moisturizer, and serum. Made with 100% natural ingredients.
